title: grok-pi Plan Mode Integration
objective: Implement plan mode lifecycle in pi-grok-adapter: ACP mode broadcast, prompt-prefix reminder injection, Pi extension beforeToolCall gate, exit_plan_mode approval flow, and plan file management — matching Grok native PlanModeTracker semantics.

phases.name: act on learning and hand off

decision_points.question: Which route should the next implementation take?

options.label: Direct implementation
options.criteria: Scope is clear, blast radius is small, and validation path is known.

options.label: Research first
options.criteria: Domain facts, dependencies, or ownership are still unclear.

options.label: Split into slices
options.criteria: The work is valid but too broad for one safe change.

decision_points.rationale: 5 layers too broad for one safe change. Split into 4 slices: (1) state machine + prompt injection, (2) tool gate extension, (3) exit flow + approval, (4) persistence + projection.

decision_points.question: After Check, should this cycle close, pivot, or continue?

options.label: Close cycle
options.criteria: Acceptance evidence is complete and no important risk remains.

options.label: Continue same cycle
options.criteria: Core direction is right but more execution is required.

options.label: Pivot plan
options.criteria: Validation changed the problem or invalidated current assumptions.

decision_points.rationale: All implementation slices and focused Rust/extension validation pass, but interactive Pager walk-through remains and ./build.sh is blocked in the optional pi-main TypeScript workspace outside this change.

validation.notes: Implementation is complete and narrow checks pass. Full build/manual TUI remain blocked or require interactive validation.

next_action: Run the four-step native Pager plan-mode walkthrough and resolve the independent pi-main workspace build issue
notes: PDCA folder relocated to /Users/dengwenyu/Dev/AI/pi-grok-build/work/20260708-grok-pi-plan-mode; state.project_root is a stale generator value and implementation SSOT is docs/issues/adapter/20260721-grok-pi-plan-mode.md.
